title: Archive safety: slug validation, containment, capped|dropped allowlist, lock+rollback, refuse mutate-archived
action: Harden archiveFeature/unarchiveFeature + mutators in skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/cells.mjs (mirror .bee/bin/lib/cells.mjs). REGRESSION NET FIRST (crit-pattern 20260714): add adversarial tests to test_lib.mjs and confirm they RED against current code, then fix. Bugs confirmed in-code: (1) archiveFeature only checks feature is non-empty string -> path.join(archiveDir, feature) with ../ escapes; add slug validation (reject anything not matching ^[A-Za-z0-9._-]+$, and canonical-containment assert that the resolved archive dir stays inside .bee/cells/archive/). (2) non-terminal filter is only open|claimed -> a blocked cell gets archived; change allowlist to archive ONLY capped|dropped, refuse if any cell is open|claimed|blocked (name offenders). (3) no atomicity: the rename loop has no lock/rollback -> wrap archiveFeature AND unarchiveFeature in withStoreLock(root, cells-archive) (a colon-free name) and on any mid-loop failure roll back already-moved files before rethrowing; write summary atomically last. (4) reopen-duplicate: mutators (updateCell line 787, claimCell 876, capCell 966, recordVerify 914, blockCell 1143, dropCell 1167) write to cellFile(active) while readCell falls back to archive -> mutating an archived cell forks a duplicate id. Add a guard: if resolveCellFile(root,id) is in the archive tree (not the active cellFile path), REFUSE the mutation with a typed error naming unarchive-first. Keep dropCell getting the same lock+ownership discipline. Mirror byte-identical; regenerate plugin trees + manifest.

truths: archiveFeature rejects any feature not matching ^[A-Za-z0-9._-]+$ and asserts the resolved archive dir is canonically inside .bee/cells/archive/ (a ../ traversal value throws, moves nothing).
Only capped|dropped cells archive; a feature containing any open|claimed|blocked cell is refused with the offending ids named.
archiveFeature and unarchiveFeature run inside withStoreLock (colon-free name) and roll back already-moved files on a mid-operation failure; summary.json written atomically.

Every cell mutator (updateCell/claimCell/capCell/recordVerify/blockCell/dropCell) REFUSES to mutate a cell that resolves to the archive tree (no duplicate-id fork); a typed error names unarchive-first.
Regression net proved RED first then GREEN; cells.mjs == .bee/bin/lib/cells.mjs byte-identical; full run_verify.mjs green.
prohibitions: Do NOT weaken the existing archive round-trip test.
Do NOT change listCells/readCell read-fallback behavior from hardening-1-7-9 predecessor cells-archive.

trace.verification_evidence: {"red_failure_evidence":"v1.7.8 archiveFeature: (1) only checked feature is non-empty string -> path.join with ../ escaped .bee/cells/archive (traversal). (2) non-terminal filter only open|claimed -> blocked cells archived, contradicting the capped/dropped contract. (3) bare fs.renameSync loop, no withStoreLock, no rollback -> mid-loop crash skews summary. (4) mutators write cellFile(active) while readCell falls back to archive -> mutating an archived cell forks a duplicate id. Confirmed in-code and by an external review; I shipped this in v1.7.8 and ran it on the real store.","green_evidence":"Fixed: FEATURE_SLUG_PATTERN ^[A-Za-z0-9._-]+$ + canonical-containment assert before any move (traversal throws, moves nothing); archive allowlist capped|dropped only, refuses open|claimed|blocked naming offenders; archiveFeature+unarchiveFeature wrapped in withStoreLock(cells-archive, colon-free), track moved triples + roll back on any mid-loop error, summary written atomically last; assertNotArchived guard at the head of updateCell/claimCell/recordVerify/capCell/blockCell/dropCell throws CellArchivedError instead of forking a duplicate. Net-first proven RED(416+4fail)->GREEN(419); orchestrator independent adversarial probe 7/7 on the real lib; mirror byte-identical; full run_verify.mjs EXIT=0."}
trace.verify_output: ORCH_VERIFY_EXIT=0 (independent). Direct adversarial probe 7/7 against real lib: traversal slug rejected+no move; blocked refuses archive; mutate-archived refused with no duplicate id. Mirror byte-identical. Worker net-first RED(4)->GREEN.
